tools.name: get_weather_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a farm location including temperature, precipitation, wind, and agricultural risk flags (frost, heat stress, flood, drought).

tools.name: get_historical_weather
tools.description: Get historical weather data for climate trend analysis. Returns statistics including average temperatures, precipitation totals, frost days, and drought periods.

tools.name: diagnose_crop_disease
tools.description: Diagnose potential crop diseases based on observed symptoms. Returns ranked list of possible diseases with severity and relevance scores.

symptoms.description: Description of observed symptoms on the plant

tools.name: get_treatment_recommendation
tools.description: Get detailed treatment recommendations for a diagnosed crop disease, including step-by-step actions, prevention tips, and urgency level.

disease_name.description: Name of the disease (e.g., 'Early Blight', 'Fall Armyworm')

tools.name: get_commodity_prices
tools.description: Get current commodity prices for a crop including 30-day trend and market context.

tools.name: get_price_forecast
tools.description: Forecast commodity price trends for planning optimal harvest and sale timing.

tools.name: get_soil_analysis
tools.description: Get soil properties for a location using ISRIC SoilGrids. Returns soil texture, pH, organic carbon, and crop suitability assessment.

tools.name: get_planting_advisory
tools.description: Get planting and harvest advisory for a crop in a specific climate zone, including optimal planting windows and management tips.

tools.name: get_climate_risk_alert
tools.description: Generate climate risk alerts based on location, crop, and current growth stage. Identifies critical vulnerabilities and recommended monitoring actions.
